workflowInfo.workflowDescription: Create a VSAM KSDS cluster with IDCAMS and verify it with LISTCAT

variable.name: VSAM_DSN
variable.label: VSAM Cluster Name
variable.abstract: Fully qualified name of the KSDS cluster to create
variable.description: Fully qualified cluster name, e.g. ANDRE.EPE.KSDS1. Keep it under the ANDRE high level qualifier. Maximum 38 characters so the .DATA and .INDEX component names still fit in 44.

variable.name: KEY_LENGTH
variable.label: Key Length
variable.abstract: Length of the KSDS key in bytes
variable.description: Length in bytes of the primary key field (KEYS length value)

variable.name: KEY_OFFSET
variable.label: Key Offset
variable.abstract: Offset of the key within the record
variable.description: Zero-based offset in bytes of the key within each record (KEYS offset value)

variable.name: MAX_RECLEN
variable.label: Maximum Record Length
variable.description: Maximum record length (second RECORDSIZE value). Must be greater than or equal to the average, and greater than key offset plus key length.

variable.name: PRIMARY_CYL
variable.label: Primary Space (cylinders)
variable.description: Primary space allocation in cylinders (first CYL value)

variable.name: SECONDARY_CYL
variable.label: Secondary Space (cylinders)
variable.description: Secondary space allocation in cylinders (second CYL value)

step.name: define-ksds
step.title: Define the VSAM KSDS cluster
step.description: Submits an IDCAMS job built from the file template /z/andre/vsam-define.template. The job runs DEFINE CLUSTER with INDEXED, KEYS, RECORDSIZE, CYL, SHAREOPTIONS(2 3) and FREESPACE(10 10), naming the DATA and INDEX components explicitly.
step.instructions: This step submits an IDCAMS DEFINE CLUSTER job for ${instance-VSAM_DSN} with KEYS(${instance-KEY_LENGTH} ${instance-KEY_OFFSET}), RECORDSIZE(${instance-AVG_RECLEN} ${instance-MAX_RECLEN}) and CYL(${instance-PRIMARY_CYL} ${instance-SECONDARY_CYL}). Success is judged by the job return code (RC 0).

step.name: verify-ksds
step.title: Verify the cluster with LISTCAT
step.description: Runs a TSO REXX exec that issues LISTCAT for the new cluster and prints a success sentinel when LISTCAT returns zero.
step.instructions: This step runs LISTCAT ENTRIES for ${instance-VSAM_DSN} in a TSO address space. The step succeeds when the output contains VSAM_VERIFY_SUCCESS.

template.inlineTemplate: /* REXX */ SAY 'Verifying VSAM cluster ${instance-VSAM_DSN}' "LISTCAT ENTRIES('${instance-VSAM_DSN}') CLUSTER" IF rc = 0 THEN DO SAY 'VSAM_VERIFY_SUCCESS' END ELSE DO SAY 'VSAM verify failed, LISTCAT rc='rc END EXIT 0

step.name: delete-ksds
step.title: Delete the cluster (optional cleanup)
step.description: Optional cleanup step. Submits an IDCAMS job that deletes the cluster created by step 1. Perform this step only when you want to remove the dataset again.
step.instructions: This step deletes ${instance-VSAM_DSN} with IDCAMS DELETE PURGE. Skip it if you want to keep the cluster.
